message:
chore: miscellaneous improvements across packages

Collection of small improvements, fixes, and cleanups across multiple
packages.

Config (config/config.go, merge.go, project.go):
- Add PaletteState type for persistent palette preferences
- Add UpsertPaletteState() for updating palette state in config files
- Add validateSafeString() to reject shell metacharacters in template
  variables (Model, ModelAlias, PersonaName)
- Add renderTOMLStringArray() helper for TOML serialization
- Config merge improvements

CASS (cass/dedup.go):
- Refactor CheckDuplicates() to use DuplicateCheckOptions struct
- Add Limit field to options with default of 5
- Cleaner API following Go options pattern

Auth (auth/claude.go, restart.go):
- Minor improvements to authentication flow
- Restart orchestration updates

Checkpoint (checkpoint/capture.go, storage.go):
- Capture improvements
- Storage handling updates

Startup (startup/startup.go):
- Add startup checks and initialization

Status (status/recovery.go, unified.go):
- Recovery logic improvements
- Unified status handling updates

Templates (templates/loader.go, parser_test.go):
- Loader improvements
- Additional parser tests

Robot (robot/*.go):
- Pass projectDir to bv functions (API change from commit 6)
- Health check updates
- Dashboard integration fixes
- Markdown rendering improvements

Scanner (scanner/*.go):
- Analysis improvements
- Autoscan updates
- Priority calculation fixes

Output (output/errors.go, progress.go, success.go):
- Standardize import ordering (stdlib, then external, then internal)

Other packages:
- tokens: Minor update
- tracker: Tracking improvements
- watcher: File watching enhancements
- plugins: Agent plugin updates
- pipeline: Pipeline processing updates
- alerts: Generator improvements
- codeblock: Parser improvements
- recipe: Recipe handling updates

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -10,10 +10,11 @@ import (
 
 // ProjectConfig represents the structure of .ntm/config.toml
 type ProjectConfig struct {
-	Defaults  ProjectDefaults  `toml:"defaults"`
-	Palette   ProjectPalette   `toml:"palette"`
-	Templates ProjectTemplates `toml:"templates"`
-	Agents    AgentConfig      `toml:"agents"`
+	Defaults     ProjectDefaults  `toml:"defaults"`
+	Palette      ProjectPalette   `toml:"palette"`
+	PaletteState PaletteState     `toml:"palette_state"`
+	Templates    ProjectTemplates `toml:"templates"`
+	Agents       AgentConfig      `toml:"agents"`
 }
 
 // ProjectDefaults holds default settings for the project

+# favorites = ["build"]
+
 [templates]
 # dir = "templates"    # Relative to .ntm/
